response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior individual contributor with genuine developer-tooling credentials — test runners (Trial), assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, and MCP code generators — plus mobile experience shipping a top-10 Apple TV app. However, this is a Level II people-management role requiring 2+ years of people management and 3 years in a formal technical leadership role, and his resume shows no evidence of managing people, running one-on-ones, setting team performance expectations, or leading organizational change. His trajectory is deep IC craftsmanship, not management, making him a mismatch for the core of this role despite relevant domain exposure.
strengths: Hands-on developer-tools experience: test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD setup, and MCP/agent tooling
15+ years of software development across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Teaching and mentorship inclination via workshops, courses, and community talks
concerns: No people-management experience — no evidence of direct reports, performance management, or team building
No formal technical leadership role; leadership signals are limited to workshops and open-source side projects
No experience leading organizational change or setting roadmaps at team/org scope
